underlying_goal: Complete Phase 10 agent integration testing of their arxiv-sanity-mcp project, then explore deployment/portability architecture decisions with rigorous experimental evidence
friction_detail: Claude prematurely concluded a deliberation document without user confirmation, made lazy analytical claims the user pushed back on, and had API mismatches with the scythe library.
brief_summary: User ran Phase 10 integration tests (110 MCP tests passing), then explored deployment architecture with spike tests and benchmarks, but had to push back on Claude's premature conclusions and lazy analysis multiple times.
